title: Property Consultant - Lodha Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Lodha Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Lodha Group are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lodha Group:
Lodha Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group!
